Project.name: Academix
Project.Description: Personal project - contains sensitive data (CNEPD, specific articles, suppliers, thesis content)

Project.name: LSM Core
Project.Description: Generic LSM framework - reusable VBA toolkit for any inventory management system

Agent.name: explore
Agent.purpose: Map codebase, find references, trace call graphs

Agent.name: builder
Agent.purpose: Write/edit VBA code, apply fixes from handoffs

Agent.name: debugger
Agent.purpose: Diagnose VBA compile/runtime errors via handoff files

Agent.name: auditor
Agent.purpose: Full DSS system audit against CNEPD standards

Agent.name: syncer
Agent.purpose: Manage VBA module import/export via build.ps1

Workflow.name: debug-handoff
Workflow.steps: handoffN.txt → diagnose → fix .bas → build.ps1 → verify.ps1 → report

Workflow.name: audit-run
Workflow.steps: dss-audit.ps1 → collect results → generate report → flag issues

Workflow.name: public-release
Workflow.steps: strip sensitive → copy to public-lsm → commit → push to GitHub

Rules.Rule: Never modify .xlsm directly - always fix source files then rebuild
Personal project stays in Dropbox/private; only generic LSM goes to GitHub
Strip all sensitive data (constants, specific articles, thesis content) before public release
Attribute VB_Name must be stripped from document modules during build.ps1 injection
Private declarations must appear before any Public procedures in a module
UDT arrays cannot be returned as Variant - use ByRef Sub pattern instead
Runtime-created controls must use Controls(name) syntax, not direct member access
